'''TC-11''' was a [[TC-series protocol droid/Legends|TC-series protocol droid]] owned by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. TC-11 accompanied [[Gode Takrab]] to the surface of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the Trade Federation's [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion of the planet]].

{{Droid-stub}}
